errors: vllm 0.19.1 CUDA kernel PTX incompatibility: Blackwell (sm_120) not supported by pre-built wheels. All vllm CUDA kernels (Marlin, Flash Attention, etc.) were compiled for sm_50-sm_90.

Root cause: PyTorch 2.6.0+cu124 doesn't support sm_120 at all (fails with 'no kernel image available'). PyTorch 2.10.0+cu128 works for basic ops but vllm custom CUDA kernels use PTX compiled with incompatible toolchain.
HF backend OOM: auto_round W4A16 model loading fails with OOM as HF tries to allocate full fp16 weights for MISSING parameters in quantized model.
Cannot build vllm from source: nvcc is CUDA 12.0, but Blackwell (sm_120) requires CUDA 12.8 toolkit.
